overview.description: The Leverage Shares 2X Long ETN Daily ETF (ETNG) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in industrials equity. The fund aims to provide 2x leveraged exposure to the daily price movement of Eaton Corporation plc (NYSE: ETN) stock, less fees, and expenses. ETNprovides electrical systems, hydraulics, aerospace components, and energy-efficient solutions for industrial, commercial, and utility applications. ETNG was launched on May 12, 2026 and is issued by Leverage Shares.
